## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that CodeLegion doesn't currently support, or supports awkwardly? Be specific — "I want to label an issue with `model:custom-x` and route it to a different VM size" is more actionable than "I want more customisation". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Optional. Sketch what the feature might look like. Don't worry about whether the implementation makes sense — the design tradeoffs are part of the discussion. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Workarounds you've tried or considered. -->

## Scope check

Out-of-scope items (per the project's design principles) include:

- AWS or GCP support
- Multi-repository per fleet
- Horizontal scaling / multi-instance controllers

If your request touches one of these, please open a discussion first instead of an issue.

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else worth knowing. -->
